analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Chinese spokesperson criticizes unnamed US officials for blaming China for COVID-19, calling it immoral and irresponsible, and urges focus on domestic response and international cooperation. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Supported. The tweet portrays US officials as immoral, irresponsible, and engaging in hostile blame-shifting against China, positioning China as the target of unjust denigration. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Partially implied via call for international cooperation, but the tweet mainly rebukes the US rather than highlighting China’s benevolence or multilateral leadership; not strong enough to count. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not referenced. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — The tweet does not discuss China’s political system or domestic values; not applicable. CH5 (The government of the CCP succeeds) — No claims about CCP governance success; not applicable. CH6 (China is interesting culturally) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1.
